text.title: Mutation Testing as the Agent Feedback Signal Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-mutation-feedback-loop methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: install-tool
step.action: Pick Stryker (JS/TS), mutmut (Python), or PIT (JVM). Install and run a sanity baseline.

step.name: set-thresholds
step.action: Choose `break` (typical 70%) and `high` (typical 80%) thresholds based on baseline + headroom.

step.name: wire-diff-scope
step.action: Configure tool to mutate only changed files in the PR.

step.name: feed-survivors-back
step.action: Emit surviving mutants as a structured artifact the agent consumes on iteration 2.

step.name: ratchet-baseline
step.action: Reject merges that lower the project-wide score by > 1 point.
step.decision-gate: If baseline drops two weeks in a row, INVESTIGATE: usually flaky equivalence claims accumulating.
